title: Key stage 2 attainment (provisional): 2025
body: "The data on explore education statistics provides provisional attainment statistics for the key stage 2 national curriculum assessments. It includes results for pupils in schools in England by:   national, regional and local authority level pupil characteristics such as:  gender disadvantage special educational needs   school characteristics such as:  school type phase religious character    "

taxons.title: Key stage 1 and 2 assessments data collection
